ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of component */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line the component belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the component was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the production line */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the production line */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Utilization rate of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the data belongs to */,
  "tau_opening" REAL /* Time taken for the component to open (in seconds) */,
  "tau_closing" REAL /* Time taken for the component to close (in seconds) */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate of the component (in kg/s) */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the component (in watts) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component (in kg) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the component (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "vibration" REAL /* Vibration of the component (in g) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the component (in bar) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the performance data */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the maintenance is performed on */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who updated the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was calculated */,
  "mtbf" REAL /* Mean time between failures (in hours) */,
  "mttr" REAL /* Mean time to repair (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, maintenance) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "assigned_technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician assigned to resolve the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the reading belongs to */,
  "reading" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the reading was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the maintenance is scheduled for */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a reminder has been sent for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data point */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the data point belongs to */,
  "feature1" REAL /* Value of feature 1 */,
  "feature2" REAL /* Value of feature 2 */,
  "..." TEXT /* ... */,
  "target" REAL /* Target value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the model is trained for */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
